summary: Login functionality testing complete. All backend auth APIs (15/15 tests passed) and frontend login flow working correctly for both demo/user123 and admin/P@ssw0rd credentials. The previous 'login timeout' issue could not be reproduced - login works as expected.

issues: Console warning: 'Unsupported style property @media (max-width: 1024px)' - should use camelCase in inline styles

critical_code_review_comments: Login flow works correctly - token stored in localStorage, user redirected to dashboard
403 errors in console are from external resources (fonts/analytics), not from API calls
Minor: Login.jsx uses @media in inline styles which causes React warning - should use CSS file or styled-components
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo and admin users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login functionality fully tested and working. Backend auth endpoints: /api/auth/login, /api/auth/register, /api/auth/me, /api/auth/profile, /api/auth/password-reset/request, /api/auth/password-reset all working correctly. Frontend login form properly stores JWT token in localStorage and redirects to dashboard. AI Co-Pilot page loads correctly after login.

features_tested.Token storage: PASS - JWT token stored in localStorage
features_tested.AI Co-Pilot page access: PASS - Page loads correctly after login
features_tested.Profile update: PASS - Users can update their profile

previous_issue_resolution.findings: Login works correctly in all tests. The 403 errors in console are from external resources (Google Fonts, analytics), not from the login API. Backend API responds correctly via both internal (localhost:8001) and external (preview URL) endpoints.
